name: agent-auth
description: Helps integrate Scalekit Agent Auth so agents can act in third-party apps on behalf of users.

interface.shortDescription: Connect agents to third-party apps safely.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through connected-account creation, user authorization, token retrieval, downstream API use, agent MCP server patterns, and production-readiness checks for Scalekit Agent Auth.
defaultPrompt: Integrate Scalekit agent auth for Gmail or Slack.
Set up a connected account flow for this agent.
Review token refresh handling for my agent integration.
